REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1927 47th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Presher for Francell Moore, Jr. (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $655,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $625,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition (subject to the written order).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
